title: [ImportVerilog] Visit class properties before methods
body:
Refactor ClassDeclVisitor to process class property declarations in a first pass and delay all other members until properties are registered. This ensures methods see a complete set of class properties during lowering.

The edge case where this could previously fail was when methods declared before properties called special class methods (e.g. `new`) which refer to yet undeclared properties.

Add a regression test covering method bodies that access properties declared later in the class.
